name: stats-high-variance
title: Stats high variance — 100 alternating small/large items

items.content: Note 0: cache miss.

TLS handshake failure investigation — root cause analysis:
Client presented cert chain with intermediate CA signed by expired root (CN=GlobalSign Root CA, expired 2021-01-28). Server's trust store was not updated after CA rotation. Affected services: payments-gateway, auth-proxy, notification-sender.
Timeline:
  - 09:12 UTC: first 503 errors on payments-gateway (rate: 0.3%)
  - 09:18 UTC: auth-proxy errors spike to 12%
  - 09:23 UTC: PagerDuty alert fired (P2)
  - 09:31 UTC: root cause identified via `openssl s_client` trace
  - 09:47 UTC: trust store updated and deployed to all nodes
  - 09:52 UTC: error rate back to baseline
References: incident-2026-01-15, runbook/tls-cert-rotation.md, ops ticket OPS-4421.
Follow-up: automate trust store rotation via cert-manager CRD; add expiry monitoring alert 30d before CA expiry.
Note 2: cache miss.

Client presented cert chain with intermediate CA signed by expired root (CN=GlobalSign Root CA, expired 2021-01-28). Server's trust store was not updated after CA rotation. Affected services: payments-gateway, auth-proxy, notification-sender.
Timeline:
  - 09:12 UTC: first 503 errors on payments-gateway (rate: 0.3%)
  - 09:18 UTC: auth-proxy errors spike to 12%
  - 09:23 UTC: PagerDuty alert fired (P2)
  - 09:31 UTC: root cause identified via `openssl s_client` trace
  - 09:47 UTC: trust store updated and deployed to all nodes
  - 09:52 UTC: error rate back to baseline
References: incident-2026-01-15, runbook/tls-cert-rotation.md, ops ticket OPS-4421.
Follow-up: automate trust store rotation via cert-manager CRD; add expiry monitoring alert 30d before CA expiry.
